name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-3
title: resolve-scope.py silently swallows find-feature.py and format-feature-context.py errors
description: resolve-scope.py wraps both subprocess calls (find-feature.py list-json on line 45, format-feature-context.py on line 53) with stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL and falls back to empty values on CalledProcessError. If either subprocess fails, the user receives a syntactically valid prompt with no features (or empty feature context) and no warning, causing the dispatched Agent to hallucinate or return empty results. Errors should propagate to stderr so the caller knows something is broken.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-4 (silent error swallowing)
